category_check.wa: N-A - no HTTP network calls; gh CLI used via subprocess only
category_check.fs: PASS - state dict extraction uses str(); no raw file path exposure; subprocess with explicit paths
category_check.pd: PASS - type hints complete: _check_pr_approver_provenance(state: Dict[str, Any]) -> Dict[str, Any]; docstring with 6-step flow; PIPELINE_ALLOWED_APPROVER as module-level SSoT constant; correct call order in cmd_gates accept branch
category_check.sec: PASS - no hardcoded credentials; PIPELINE_ALLOWED_APPROVER from os.environ.get(); subprocess shell=False with list args; bandit E2E scan: High=0 Medium=0
category_check.al: PASS - Optional None checks complete; pr_number None guard; _comments empty list defense; _found_approver None guard; accept_code empty fallback; explicit timeouts (10s git, 30s gh)
category_check.build: N-A - meta-task; EXE build not applicable

mt.note: checkpoint hash changed after d3432b3 CLI Evidence Contract fix; no functional change; 4 tests PASS confirmed

cli_evidence_contract.detail: tools/check_cli_evidence_contract.py PASS - no violations. All 4 TestProvenance methods have explicit PIPELINE_STATE_PATH literal.

acceptance_criteria_verification.criterion: gates accept BLOCKED without GitHub PR comment approver evidence
E2E tests have PIPELINE_STATE_PATH isolation + final_state assertion
ci.yml policy comment added, YAML valid

qa_report.improvement_suggestions: MT-2 checkpoint hash mismatch is expected - CLI Evidence Contract fix applied after module QA; no functional change; verified by 4 PASS tests. E501 line length warnings in _check_pr_approver_provenance are due to Korean error messages; no functional impact.
